name: frontmost
description: A live now using badge for your Mac.

scripts.check: npm test && npm run check:syntax && wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/http.js && node --check src/icons.js && node --check src/presence.js && node --check src/widget-source.js && node -e "import('./src/widget-source.js').then(({ WIDGET_JS }) => new Function(WIDGET_JS))"
